expectations.evidence: Designer-visible section has zero element IDs. No EVID-1, NCON-1, RULE-1 visible anywhere in observations, info package, or commentary.

Translated in observations: 'a design requirement has emerged that isn't grounded in anything we've established — it needs either evidence that it's truly necessary or a designer directive to stand.'
